current_title: Manager, Launch & SOP Readiness — Neue Klasse Production

education.distinction: Specialisation in manufacturing and launch management

career_history.title: Manager, Launch & SOP Readiness — Neue Klasse Production
career_history.scope: Coordinates launch-readiness tracking, cross-functional issue resolution, and SOP governance for Neue Klasse production workstreams; 4 direct reports and broad matrix influence

key_achievements.achievement: Improved launch issue transparency and ownership discipline across multiple workstreams
key_achievements.metric: Critical launch blockers with named owner and closure date increased from 58% to 96% within one quarter

key_achievements.achievement: Helped redesign concurrent-review governance for late-stage industrialization issues
key_achievements.metric: Average decision cycle time on escalated launch issues reduced 37%

career_history.title: Project Lead, Production Industrialisation
career_history.scope: Project management for industrialisation readiness in EV-related production systems

key_achievements.achievement: Introduced launch dashboard structure used by multiple cross-functional teams
key_achievements.metric: Launch status reporting preparation time reduced 45%

career_history.title: Junior Project Engineer / Operations Analyst
career_history.scope: Analytical and coordination support roles in production planning and industrialisation

key_achievements.achievement: Supported issue-resolution analytics in pre-series planning
key_achievements.metric: Improved escalation reporting accuracy and planning visibility

leadership_indicators.leadership_style_self_described: Energetic, transparent, and execution-focused. I try to create enough structure that difficult launch phases can move fast without becoming chaotic.
leadership_indicators.decision_making_style: Fast within scope, cautious outside scope. Comfortable under deadline pressure but still dependent on sponsorship when conflict becomes political.
leadership_indicators.conflict_handling: Professional and diplomatic, though not yet battle-tested in hard executive conflict.
leadership_indicators.change_orientation: High; naturally attracted to accelerated launch and transformation contexts.
leadership_indicators.risk_appetite: Moderately high in project environments, lower in politically exposed ones.

notable_leadership_moments.situation: A launch-readiness program suffered from fragmented issue ownership and duplicated governance forums.
notable_leadership_moments.action: Neumann consolidated trackers, imposed ownership standards, and pushed for a simplified escalation rhythm.
notable_leadership_moments.outcome: Decision-making speed improved and senior leadership visibility increased.

performance_reviews.summary: Strong launch-management potential, high energy, good executive communication for level. Main gap is absence of mature line leadership and operational authority.

interview_notes.overall_impression: High-potential and unusually relevant to Neue Klasse acceleration scenarios, but currently too narrow and too young for a full regional production mandate.

question_responses.question: How would you accelerate SOP by 6 months?
question_responses.response_summary: Focused on decision rights, concurrent gate reviews, pilot build cadence, and contingency funding logic.
question_responses.interviewer_assessment: Very good thinking; limited proof of having personally carried equivalent accountability.

interview_notes.case_study_performance: Strong in launch governance logic, weaker in workforce, quality politics, and crisis authority.

red_flags: No true plant leadership track record
Could look impressive in interviews but collapse under full role complexity
green_flags: Very relevant to launch and SOP acceleration scenarios
Strong internal context and low cultural risk
Could be a strong future successor profile
